scripts.dev:ollama: cross-env VITE_AI_PROVIDER=ollama concurrently "pnpm run dev:apps" "pnpm run dev:llm:ollama"
scripts.prod:ollama: cross-env VITE_AI_PROVIDER=ollama pnpm run prod:frontend:build && concurrently "pnpm run prod:frontend:start" "pnpm run prod:server" "pnpm run prod:llm:ollama"
scripts.prod:gigachat: cross-env VITE_AI_PROVIDER=gigachat pnpm run prod:frontend:build && concurrently "pnpm run prod:frontend:start" "pnpm run prod:server"
